prestazioni: Engine: AAH 2.8L VR6 (12v) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Paired with a Schrick 268/272 camshaft set and titanium retainers from Supertech Performance for high-RPM stability.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom-built 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Autotech, feeding into a 3.5-inch downpipe with a Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter. Boost controlled via a TurboSmart e-Boost2 controller set to 18 psi with a custom VR6-specific tune by APR (Stage 3+ software).

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Integrated Engineering. Ignition upgraded with NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (gap set to 0.024") and a standalone Megasquirt MS3Pro ECU with VR6-specific firmware for precise timing control. Additional cooling via a Setrab 50-row oil cooler and a Davies Craig EWP115 electric water pump.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 Jetta MK3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 9.5-inch-wide BBS RS wheels (ET15) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 255/35/17 rear).

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the VR6’s front subframe geometry, paired with H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear sway bars. Polyurethane bushings from 034 Motorsport replace all factory rubber mounts.

Interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, bolted to a custom 8-point roll cage by Autopower. Dash replaced with a digital AIM MXS Strada dash and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Rear seats removed and replaced with a custom aluminum firewall and a 3-gallon fuel cell by Fuel Safe.
